code: import api from'./api';export const getAlbums=()=>api.get('/albums');export const getAlbum=id=>api.get("/albums/".concat(id));export const createAlbum=data=>api.post('/albums',data);export const createAlbumWithImage=formData=>api.post('/albums/create',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});export const updateAlbum=(id,data)=>api.put("/albums/".concat(id),data);export const updateAlbumWithImage=(id,formData)=>api.put("/albums/".concat(id),formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});export const deleteAlbum=id=>api.delete("/albums/".concat(id));
